content: ARCHITECTURE: AGENTS.md (Root Lighthouse) is the AI entry point. .kit/ (Cognitive Vault) is private. Disk Reality > Git History. L1 (Regex) -> L2 (Vantage) -> L3 (SQLite).
VANTAGE LAW: Vantage (v1.2.4) is a strict structural sensor. Verifies files, NOT directories (.). Rejects non-AST noise. 5ms latency target. Never guess structural hashes.
DAILY RITUAL: 1. 'kit recall' (Hydrate). 2. 'kit-vantage verify' (Physical Truth). 3. 'kit-agent ask' (Pre-match). 4. 'kit learn --tag friction' (Log anomalies).
WEEKLY REFLECTION: 1. 'kit stats' (Density). 2. 'kit doctor --mode safe' (Hygiene). 3. 'kit context' (Drift). Prune useless invariants. Ingest friction as patterns.
MONTHLY SYNTHESIS: 1. Identify Top-10 failure modes. 2. Promote episodic to semantic. 3. 'kit-vantage seal' to freeze version structure.
EXPERT COMMANDS: Use 'kit recall | fzf' for discovery. Use 'kit learn --auto' for routine ingestion. Use 'kit reflect --here' before risky edits.
GOVERNANCE: Fail fast. Mandatory 'kit preflight -m' before commits. Zero-tolerance for non-ASCII in core library (Diamond Shield).
TOKEN LAW: Zero static docs. Rely on 'kit --help' for syntax and 'kit recall' for rituals. Every token saved is a token for reasoning.
AUTO-ROUTING LAW: 'kit learn --auto' blocks secrets (sk-, passwords), drops noise, skips duplicates. Abstract concepts -> Global; Project-specific -> Local.
OUTPUT CONTRACT: Agents MUST return JSON: { 'decision': 'PASS|WARN|BLOCK', 'reason': 'str', 'confidence': float }. Exit codes: PASS=0, BLOCK=1, ERROR=2.
STORAGE: SQLite in STRICT + WAL Mode. Enables concurrent multi-agent access and 60FPS IDE experience during heavy RAG operations.
